mapper.sql: d.defect_id, d.test_case_id, tc.test_case_name, d.business_name, d.business_unit, d.major_category, d.middle_category, d.title, d.content, d.registrant_id, ru.user_name AS registrant_name, d.developer_id, dv.user_name AS developer_name, d.defect_status, dc.code_name AS defect_status_name, d.fix_content, d.is_final_closed, d.created_id, d.created_at, d.updated_id, d.updated_at, bu_c.code_name AS business_unit_name, maj_c.code_name AS major_category_name, mid_c.code_name AS middle_category_name

LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE bu_c ON bu_c.code_value = d.business_unit AND bu_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND bu_c.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'BUSINESS_CATEGORY' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE maj_c ON maj_c.code_value = d.major_category AND maj_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND maj_c.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = d.business_unit || '_MAJOR' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE mid_c ON mid_c.code_value = d.middle_category AND mid_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND mid_c.code_group_id = (SELECT g.code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP g WHERE g.business_unit = d.business_unit AND g.category_level = 'MIDDLE' AND g.parent_code_value = d.major_category AND g.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_DEFECT d LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE tc ON tc.test_case_id = d.test_case_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER ru ON ru.user_id = d.registrant_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER dv ON dv.user_id = d.developer_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE dc ON dc.code_value = d.defect_status AND dc.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'DEFECT_STATUS' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY d.defect_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_DEFECT d LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE tc ON tc.test_case_id = d.test_case_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER ru ON ru.user_id = d.registrant_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER dv ON dv.user_id = d.developer_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE dc ON dc.code_value = d.defect_status AND dc.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'DEFECT_STATUS' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
WHERE d.defect_id = #{defectId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_DEFECT (test_case_id, business_unit, major_category, middle_category, title, content, registrant_id, developer_id, defect_status, fix_content, is_final_closed, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{testCaseId}, #{businessUnit}, #{majorCategory}, #{middleCategory}, #{title}, #{content}, #{registrantId}, #{developerId}, COALESCE(#{defectStatus}, 'ANALYSIS'), #{fixContent}, FALSE, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_DEFECT SET business_unit = #{businessUnit}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, middle_category = #{middleCategory}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, developer_id = #{developerId}, fix_content = #{fixContent}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE defect_id = #{defectId}

UPDATE TB_HKTMS_DEFECT SET defect_status = #{defectStatus}, fix_content = #{fixContent}, is_final_closed = #{isFinalClosed}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE defect_id = #{defectId}
UPDATE TB_HKTMS_DEFECT SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE defect_id = #{defectId}
